PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>

PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT  ?officeholder ?startTime
WHERE
  { wd:Q1048744  wdt:P1308  ?officeholder
    OPTIONAL
      { ?officeholder
                  p:P39    ?statement .
        ?statement  ps:P39  wd:Q1048744 ;
                  pq:P580  ?startTime
      }
  }
ORDER BY ?startTime

question: How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?
sparql:
PREFIX  schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX  pq:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>

PREFIX  ps:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS ?count)
WHERE
  { ?president  wdt:P31  wd:Q7747
    OPTIONAL
      { ?president  wdt:P580  ?startTime }
    FILTER ( ( ! bound(?startTime) ) || ( ?startTime > "1990-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime ) )
  }

sparql:

PREFIX  pq:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>

PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { wd:Q25369  p:P54  ?kobeMembershipStatement .
    ?kobeMembershipStatement
              ps:P54  wd:Q121783
    OPTIONAL
      { ?kobeMembershipStatement
                  pq:P580  ?kobeStart
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?kobeMembershipStatement
                  pq:P582  ?kobeEnd
      }
    wd:Q36159  p:P54  ?lebronMembershipStatement .
    ?lebronMembershipStatement
              ps:P54  wd:Q121783
    OPTIONAL
      { ?lebronMembershipStatement
                  pq:P580  ?lebronStart
      }
    FILTER ( bound(?kobeEnd) && bound(?lebronStart) )
    FILTER ( ?kobeEnd <= ?lebronStart )
  }

question: Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>

PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { { SELECT  ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
      WHERE
        { wd:Q10800557  wdt:P112  ?founder .
          ?founder  wdt:P69   ?university
        }
      GROUP BY ?university
      HAVING ( ?count >= 2 )
    }
  }

question: Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?

PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>

PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { ?batman  rdfs:label  "Batman"@en
      { ?batman  wdt:P451  ?partner }
    UNION
      { ?batman  wdt:P26  ?partner }
    UNION
      { ?batman  wdt:P3373  ?partner }
    UNION
      { ?batman  wdt:P527  ?partner }
    FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?partner  wdt:P103  ?lang
                        FILTER ( ?lang != wd:Q1860 )
                      }
  }

question: How many spouses do head of states have on average?
sparql:
PREFIX  schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX  pq:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX  pr:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>
PREFIX  ps:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  wdt:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX  wds:  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/>
PREFIX  wdv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/value/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT  (AVG(?spouseCount) AS ?averageSpouses)
WHERE
  { { SELECT  ?headOfState (COUNT(?spouse) AS ?spouseCount)
      WHERE
        { ?headOfState  wdt:P31  wd:Q48352
          OPTIONAL
            { ?headOfState  wdt:P26  ?spouse }
        }
      GROUP BY ?headOfState
    }
  }

PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>

PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>

PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>

PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { wd:Q42053  p:P1082  ?popStatement1 .
    ?popStatement1
              ps:P1082  ?popValue1 ;
              pq:P585   ?time1
    FILTER ( ?time1 > "2006-12-31T23:59:59Z"^^xsd:dateTime )
    wd:Q42053  p:P1082  ?popStatement2 .
    ?popStatement2
              ps:P1082  ?popValue2 ;
              pq:P585   ?time2
    FILTER ( ?time2 > "2006-12-31T23:59:59Z"^^xsd:dateTime )
    FILTER ( ?time1 < ?time2 )
    FILTER ( ?popValue2 > ?popValue1 )
  }

PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { ?place  wdt:P131  wd:Q39 ;
            wdt:P625  ?coord
    BIND(str(?coord) AS ?coordStr)
    BIND(xsd:double(strafter(strbefore(?coordStr, ")"), " ")) AS ?lat)
    FILTER ( ?lat > 47.8 )
  }

PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT  ?lifespanYears
WHERE
  { ?dog  wdt:P31   wd:Q144 ;
          wdt:P569  ?birthDate ;
          wdt:P570  ?deathDate
    BIND(( year(?deathDate) - year(?birthDate) ) AS ?lifespanYears)
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?lifespanYears)
OFFSET  1
LIMIT   1

PREFIX  pq:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX  pr:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>
PREFIX  ps:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  wdt:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX  wds:  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/>
PREFIX  wdv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/value/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?river) AS ?riverCount)
WHERE
  { ?river  wdt:P31  wd:Q4022
      { ?river  wdt:P131  wd:Q1577 }
    UNION
      { ?river    wdt:P131  ?neighborState .
        ?neighborState
                  wdt:P47   wd:Q1577
      }
  }

SELECT  ?state
WHERE
  { wd:Q608350  wdt:P159  ?location .
    ?location  wdt:P131  ?district .
    ?district  wdt:P131  ?governmentRegion .
    ?governmentRegion
              wdt:P131  ?state
  }
LIMIT   1

PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { wd:Q42053  p:P1376  ?statement .
    ?statement  ps:P1376  ?entity
    OPTIONAL
      { ?statement  pq:P580  ?startTime }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?statement  pq:P582  ?endTime }
    FILTER ( ( ( ! bound(?startTime) ) || ( ?startTime <= "0934-12-31T23:59:59Z"^^xsd:dateTime ) ) && ( ( ! bound(?endTime) ) || ( ?endTime >= "0934-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime ) ) )
  }

question: Is the number of countries in Europe larger than that in Asia?
sparql:
PREFIX  schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX  pq:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX  pr:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>
PREFIX  ps:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  wdt:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX  wds:  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/>
PREFIX  wdv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/value/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { { SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?europeCountry) AS ?countEurope)
      WHERE
        { ?europeCountry
                    wdt:P31  wd:Q6256 ;
                    wdt:P30  wd:Q46
        }
    }
    { SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?asiaCountry) AS ?countAsia)
      WHERE
        { ?asiaCountry  wdt:P31  wd:Q6256 ;
                    wdt:P30  wd:Q48
        }
    }
    FILTER ( ?countEurope > ?countAsia )
  }

PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?person) AS ?count)
WHERE
  { ?person   wdt:P166    wd:Q71719 ;
              wdt:P172    ?ethnicGroup .
    ?ethnicGroup  rdfs:label  ?ethnicLabel
    FILTER contains(lcase(?ethnicLabel), "african american")
    FILTER ( lang(?ethnicLabel) = "en" )
  }

PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT  ?firstEvent
WHERE
  { BIND("1960-09-30"^^xsd:dateTime AS ?flintstonesStart)
    BIND("1965-01-01"^^xsd:dateTime AS ?votingRightsActDate)

  }
LIMIT   1

  }

LIMIT   3

PREFIX  pq:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX  pr:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>

PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT  ?archipelago
WHERE
  { { SELECT  ?archipelago (COUNT(?island) AS ?count)
      WHERE
        { VALUES ?archipelago { wd:Q38095 wd:Q192626 }
          ?archipelago  wdt:P527  ?island
        }
      GROUP BY ?archipelago
    }
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT   1

PREFIX  wds:  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/>
PREFIX  wdv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/value/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { wd:Q183   p:P1082   ?popStatement2010 .
    ?popStatement2010
              ps:P1082  ?pop2010 ;
              pq:P585   ?date2010
    FILTER ( year(?date2010) = 2010 )
    wd:Q183   p:P1082   ?popStatementLatest .
    ?popStatementLatest
              ps:P1082  ?popLatest ;
              pq:P585   ?dateLatest
    FILTER ( year(?dateLatest) > 2010 )
    FILTER NOT EXISTS { wd:Q183   p:P1082   ?popStatementOther .
                        ?popStatementOther
                                  ps:P1082  ?popOther ;
                                  pq:P585   ?dateOther
                        FILTER ( ( year(?dateOther) > 2010 ) && ( ?dateOther > ?dateLatest ) )
                      }
    BIND(( ( ( ?popLatest - ?pop2010 ) / ?pop2010 ) * 100 ) AS ?growthPercent)
    FILTER ( ?growthPercent >= 1 )
  }

  }

PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT  (SUM(?area) AS ?totalArea)
WHERE
  { ?lake  wdt:P31     wd:Q23397 ;
           wdt:P2046   ?area ;
           rdfs:label  ?label
    FILTER ( lang(?label) = "en" )
    FILTER ( ( ( ( regex(?label, "Lake Superior", "i") || regex(?label, "Lake Michigan", "i") ) || regex(?label, "Lake Huron", "i") ) || regex(?label, "Lake Erie", "i") ) || regex(?label, "Lake Ontario", "i") )
  }
